data.en: It was Daming's birthday yesterday.
data.cn: 昨天是大明的生日。
data.hint: Past tense verb 'was' / 过去式动词 'was'

data.en: He got many presents from his family and friends.
data.cn: 他收到了很多来自家人和朋友的礼物。
data.hint: Past tense of 'get' / 'get' 的过去式

data.en: Simon's mum bought him a present too.
data.cn: 西蒙的妈妈也给他买了一份礼物。
data.hint: Past tense of 'buy' / 'buy' 的过去式

data.en: It was a book about space travel.
data.cn: 那是一本关于太空旅行的书。
data.hint: Preposition 'about' / 介词 'about'

data.en: Daming is very interested in space travel.
data.cn: 大明对太空旅行非常感兴趣。
data.hint: Be interested in / 对...感兴趣

data.en: He loves the present very much.
data.cn: 他非常喜欢这个礼物。
data.hint: Love something very much / 非常喜欢某物

data.en: Daming showed Simon his birthday present.
data.cn: 大明给西蒙看了他的生日礼物。
data.hint: Show someone something / 给某人看某物

data.en: Simon was interested in the book too.
data.cn: 西蒙也对这本书感兴趣。
data.hint: Past tense of 'be' / 'be' 动词的过去式

data.en: Daming asked him to read the book with him.
data.cn: 大明让他和自己一起读这本书。
data.hint: Ask someone to do something / 让某人做某事

data.en: Daming and Simon finished the book.
data.cn: 大明和西蒙读完了这本书。
data.hint: Past tense 'finished' / 过去式 'finished'

data.en: Then they decided to make a paper spaceship together.
data.cn: 然后他们决定一起做一个纸飞船。
data.hint: Decide to do something / 决定做某事

data.en: They gave the spaceship to Simon's mum.
data.cn: 他们把飞船给了西蒙的妈妈。
data.hint: Give something to someone / 给某人某物

data.en: Daming thanked her for the birthday present.
data.cn: 大明为了生日礼物向她道谢。
data.hint: Thank someone for something / 因为某事感谢某人

data.en: She was very happy.
data.cn: 她非常高兴。
data.hint: Past tense / 过去式

data.en: In the book, they saw many pictures of spaceships.
data.cn: 在书里，他们看到了很多飞船的图片。
data.hint: Past tense of 'see' / 'see' 的过去式

data.en: They learnt a lot about space travel.
data.cn: 他们学到了很多关于太空旅行的知识。
data.hint: Past tense 'learnt' (British English) / 过去式 'learnt'
accept: They learned a lot about space travel.

data.en: What did you buy on the earth?
data.cn: 你在地球上买了什么？
data.hint: Past tense question / 过去式疑问句

data.en: This T-shirt is for you.
data.cn: 这件T恤衫是给你的。
data.hint: For someone / 给某人

data.en: It's beautiful. But I can't wear it.
data.cn: 它很漂亮。但是我穿不了。
data.hint: Can't + base verb / 不能 + 动词原形
accept: It is beautiful. But I cannot wear it.

data.en: I bought a lot of things.
data.cn: 我买了很多东西。
data.hint: Past tense of 'buy' / 'buy' 的过去式

data.en: The name of the spaceship is Shenzhou V.
data.cn: 这艘飞船的名字是神舟五号。
data.hint: The name of... / ...的名字

data.en: Look at our spaceship.
data.cn: 看我们的飞船。
data.hint: Look at / 看

data.en: It took us to the earth.
data.cn: 它把我们带到了地球。
data.hint: Take someone to a place / 带某人去某地

data.en: And brought back our presents.
data.cn: 并带回了我们的礼物。
data.hint: Bring back (Past tense: brought) / 带回（过去式：brought）

data.en: Daming and Simon made a model of a Chinese spaceship.
data.cn: 大明和西蒙做了一个中国飞船模型。
data.hint: Past tense of 'make' / 'make' 的过去式

data.en: In 2003, it took a Chinese taikonaut into space.
data.cn: 2003年，它把一名中国宇航员送入了太空。
data.hint: Preposition 'into' / 介词 'into'

data.en: It took the national flag of China.
data.cn: 它带上了中国国旗。
data.hint: National flag / 国旗

data.en: The earth goes around the sun.
data.cn: 地球绕着太阳转。
data.hint: Scientific fact uses simple present / 科学事实用一般现在时

data.en: You travel to space in a spaceship.
data.cn: 你乘坐飞船去太空旅行。
data.hint: In a spaceship / 乘坐飞船

data.en: She bought an interesting book about space travel.
data.cn: 她买了一本关于太空旅行的有趣的书。
data.hint: Use 'an' before 'interesting' / 在 'interesting' 前用 'an'

data.en: Simon gave Daming a birthday present.
data.cn: 西蒙给了大明一份生日礼物。
data.hint: Give someone something / 给某人某物

data.en: My sister said, "Please buy me a hen."
data.cn: 我妹妹说：“请给我买只母鸡。”
data.hint: Direct quote / 直接引语

data.en: So I bought her a hen.
data.cn: 所以我给她买了一只母鸡。
data.hint: Buy someone something / 给某人买某物

data.en: She put the hen in the basket.
data.cn: 她把母鸡放在篮子里。
data.hint: Put ... in ... / 把...放在...里

data.en: She hung the basket on the bike.
data.cn: 她把篮子挂在自行车上。
data.hint: Hang (Past tense: hung) / 挂（过去式：hung）

data.en: Then she went away.
data.cn: 然后她走开了。
data.hint: Go away (Past tense: went away) / 走开

data.en: And she didn't even say, "Thank you!"
data.cn: 她甚至没说：“谢谢！”
data.hint: Didn't + base verb / didn't + 动词原形

data.en: I bought you a present.
data.cn: 我给你买了礼物。
data.hint: Past tense 'bought' / 过去式 'bought'

data.en: They saw pictures of spaceships from China, Russia and the US.
data.cn: 他们看到了来自中国、俄罗斯和美国的飞船图片。
data.hint: From + place / 来自...
accept: They saw pictures of spaceships from China, Russia, and the US.

data.en: It took a Chinese taikonaut into space for the first time.
data.cn: 它首次把中国宇航员送入了太空。
data.hint: For the first time / 第一次

data.en: Did you buy a book?
data.cn: 你买书了吗？
data.hint: Did + base verb / Did + 动词原形

data.en: Yes, I did.
data.cn: 是的，我买了。
data.hint: Short answer / 简短回答

data.en: No, I didn't.
data.cn: 不，我没买。
data.hint: Negative short answer / 否定简短回答

data.en: We bought some seeds too.
data.cn: 我们也买了一些种子。
data.hint: Some + plural noun / some + 复数名词

data.en: He went into space.
data.cn: 他进入了太空。
data.hint: Go into (Past tense: went into) / 进入

data.en: The spaceship flew to the moon.
data.cn: 飞船飞向了月球。
data.hint: Fly (Past tense: flew) / 飞向

data.en: It returned to the earth.
data.cn: 它返回了地球。
data.hint: Return to / 返回

data.en: I made a model plane.
data.cn: 我做了一个飞机模型。
data.hint: Make (Past tense: made) / 制作

data.en: She asked him to play.
data.cn: 她让他去玩。
data.hint: Ask someone to do / 让某人做某事

data.en: We learned a lot.
data.cn: 我们学到了很多。
data.hint: Learn (Past tense: learned/learnt) / 学习
